subject: Withdrawal still pending after 3 days
message: Hi, my withdrawal has been pending for 3 days. The app said 24 hours. Can you tell me what's going on and speed it up?

subject: I was charged twice
message: I made one deposit but I see two charges on my card statement. Please refund the extra one today.

subject: Can you verify my account now?
message: I uploaded my ID this morning. Please manually approve my account today because I need to trade urgently.

subject: How do I close my account?
message: I want to permanently close my account. What steps should I follow and what happens to my funds?
